title: Boole Algebra and Combinational Circuits
summary: Covers the theoretical foundations of digital logic from the axiomatic Boole algebra through truth tables, DNF/CNF, logic gates, and minimisation techniques (algebraic and Karnaugh), to practical combinational circuit building blocks: multiplexers, decoders, adders and the ALU.
key_concepts: half-adder / full adder / ripple-carry / carry lookahead
learning_objectives: Apply Boole algebra axioms and theorems
Construct and minimise Boole functions via algebraic rewriting and Karnaugh diagrams
Implement Boole functions using gates, MUX, and decoders
Design adder circuits and understand ALU structure
